classification.task_goal: Complete the development of a mobile Android app by implementing user-specified features.
primary_constraints: Send only the modified code files when requested.
Display the selected photos correctly in the app.
classification.reasoning: The AI initially failed to display the selected photos correctly and sent the entire code instead of just the changes. However, the user provided feedback, and the AI made corrections to the code to address the issues, indicating a repair of the constraints.
